senses.gloss: to glisten, to shine, to strike the eye

examples.text: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَاضِرَةٌ / إِلَى رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌ

senses.gloss: to let glisten, to render shiny, to make strike the eye
material of best quality such as that strikes the eye (usually gold)
shiny, glistening, of a fresh colour

etymology.text: See the etymology of the corresponding lemma form.
